---
title: "References — RNA-seq & bulk omics"
---

Foundational literature underpinning CTIR's [`bambamR`](https://github.com/CTTIR/bambamR) and adjacent bulk-omics work.

::: {.callout-warning}
## TODO_FILL_BEFORE_DEPLOY

Awaiting DOI-verified citations. Expected entries:

- DESeq2 (Love, Huber, Anders, 2014)
- edgeR (Robinson, McCarthy, Smyth, 2010)
- limma-voom (Law, Chen, Shi, Smyth, 2014)
- STAR aligner (Dobin et al., 2013)
- salmon (Patro et al., 2017)
- tximport (Soneson, Love, Robinson, 2015)
:::
